title: How Police Captured Colorado's Smartest Killer

beats.description: Dramatic opening showing the mother discovering Crystal's body and Daniel leaving for work, establishing the calculated nature of the crime.
Introduces the Krug family, the initial stalking reports, and the first police response to the garage break-in.
Stalking intensifies with explicit threats, photos, and PI involvement. Detective Martinez is assigned to the case.
Explores marital strain, Daniel's initial interview, and the stalker's false promise to back off, lowering the family's guard.
The killer infiltrates the home, attacks Crystal, and Daniel reports her missing. Police and family arrive to discover the body.
Scene processing, medics' efforts, family grief, and initial interviews with Daniel and the children reveal the stalker's psychological manipulation.
Family interviews cast doubt on the stalker's identity. Anthony is located in Utah, shifting investigative focus.
Anthony's alibi clears him. A past victim's testimony reveals a matching pattern, officially making Daniel a prime suspect.
Surveillance timeline analysis shows cameras disabled during the murder. IP evidence links the stalker's accounts to Daniel's workplace.
Martinez confronts Daniel with digital evidence and motive. Daniel's facade crumbles, and he requests an attorney.
Final digital evidence confirms Daniel's guilt. Arrest footage is shown, followed by case resolution and narrative closure.
